message:
fix(codegen): Fix from-import generation for stdlib modules with Zig implementations

Two fixes for module import resolution:

1. Register weakref with proper runtime.Lib path in import_registry
   - Changed from "std" to "runtime.Lib.weakref"
   - Enables proper const weakref = runtime.Lib.weakref; generation

2. Don't skip from-imports for stdlib modules that have Zig implementations
   - from_imports.zig was skipping all "builtin modules" via isBuiltinModule()
   - Now checks import_registry first - if module has zig_import/direct_import,
     generates from-import symbols (e.g., const WeakSet = weakref.WeakSet;)

This fixes ~19 WeakSet errors in test_weakset (28 -> 9 errors).
